issues.field: Vendor signature for white receipts below 200,000 VND
issues.description: The receipt does not show the seller signature, which is mandatory for white receipts below 200,000 VND.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Where vendor does not have stamp, white receipt must show vendor name, address, date of purchase and signature of seller.

issues.field: Local Employer details on VAT/Red invoice above 200,000 VND
issues.description: The receipt does not show the local employer details for GoGlobal Vietnam Company Limited as required for VAT/Red invoices above 200,000 VND.
issues.recommendation: Please ensure that the VAT/Red invoice includes GoGlobal Vietnam Company Limited, Tax Code: 0315261446, Address: Tầng 1, tòa nhà Packsimex, 52 Đông Du, Phường Bến Nghé, Quận 1, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh City.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: VAT/Red invoice must show: GOGLOBAL VIETNAM COMPANY LIMITED, Tax Code: 0315261446, Address: Tầng 1, tòa nhà Packsimex, 52 Đông Du, Phường Bến Nghé, Quận 1, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh City.

issues.description: The receipt does not include the Boarding Pass, the flight ticket, and a red invoice as required for flight expenses.
issues.recommendation: Please provide the Boarding Pass, the flight ticket, and a red invoice for flight expenses.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Air Ticket claims must include the Boarding Pass, the flight ticket and a red invoice.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has issues with missing seller signature for white receipts below 200,000 VND, missing local employer details on VAT/Red invoice above 200,000 VND, and missing additional documentation for flight expenses.
